subject: 英语
description: 广东中考英语 · 语法专项训练 + 单词突破

modules.title: 代词（主格/宾格/形物/名物）
modules.knowledge: 动词前用主（I），动词/介词后用宾（me）；有名则形（my book），无名则名（It is mine）。

parts.instructions: 从A、B、C三个选项中选出可以填入空白处的最佳选项。

questions.stem: My English teacher is very kind. We all like ___ very much.
questions.analysis: 横线在动词 like 后面，动词/介词后用宾格。she的宾格是her，故选B。技巧：动词后找宾格 me/her/him/them。

questions.stem: ___ is a hero. He saved a little girl from the fire yesterday.
questions.analysis: 横线在句子开头，后面紧跟动词 is，缺少主语，用主格He。技巧：句子开头+动词前=主格。

questions.stem: This is not my schoolbag. ___ is blue.
questions.analysis: 横线后面没有名词，表示「我的书包」，用名物代Mine。技巧：有名则形，无名则名。

questions.stem: My sister loves music. ___ often plays the piano in the evening.
questions.analysis: 横线在句子开头，后面是动词 plays，缺少主语，用主格She。技巧：代词要前后一致，前文My sister是女性。

parts.instructions: 用括号内单词的正确形式填空。

questions.stem: My name is Li Hua. ___ (I) have a good friend.
questions.analysis: 横线在动词have前面，作主语，用主格I。技巧：动词前找主格。

questions.stem: ___ (he) name is Zhang Wei. He is my classmate.
questions.analysis: 横线后面有名词name，用形物代His。技巧：横线+名词=形物代。

questions.stem: Zhang Wei took many photos and showed ___ (they) to me.
questions.analysis: 横线在动词showed后面，作宾语，用宾格them。技巧：动词后用宾格。

questions.stem: The red hat on the grass is ___ (he). He bought it yesterday.
questions.analysis: 横线在句末，后面没有名词，表示「他的（帽子）」，用名物代his。技巧：his形物代和名物代同形，后面没名词就是名物代。
